title: Croatian Eggs Frittata
description: A low-calorie-friendly, delicious Croatian dish perfect for a lazy Sunday morning. This recipe features free-range eggs beaten, sautéed, and roasted in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Heat the cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Melt 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the skillet.
Add the shredded carrots, zucchini, and red bell pepper to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Beat the eggs in a large bowl and season with salt, black pepper, and chopped chives.
Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables in the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the eggs start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked through and the edges are golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
